widgets.title: Final Score by School Name
widgets.description: Average final score for students grouped by school name.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT "school_name" AS label, CAST(AVG("final_score") AS DOUBLE) AS value FROM "t_student_performance" GROUP BY "school_name" ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 25

widgets.title: Final Score Distribution by Department
widgets.description: Shows the proportion of total final scores aggregated by each department.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT "department" AS label, CAST(SUM(TRY_CAST("final_score" AS DOUBLE)) AS DOUBLE) AS value FROM "t_student_performance" GROUP BY "department" ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 10

widgets.title: Final Score vs Gpa Points Correlation
widgets.description: Scatter plot showing the correlation between students' final scores and their GPA points.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT CAST("final_score" AS DOUBLE) AS x, "gpa_points" AS y, "school_name" AS col1 FROM "t_student_performance" WHERE "final_score" IS NOT NULL AND "gpa_points" IS NOT NULL LIMIT 1000

widgets.title: School Name × Department Heatmap
widgets.description: Average GPA points by school name and department
widgets.dataKey: SELECT "school_name" AS row, "department" AS col, CAST(AVG("gpa_points") AS DOUBLE) AS value FROM "t_student_performance" GROUP BY "school_name", "department" ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 400

widgets.title: School Name Ranked by Gpa Points
widgets.description: Average GPA points per school, ranked descending
widgets.dataKey: SELECT "school_name" AS label, CAST(AVG("gpa_points") AS DOUBLE) AS value FROM "t_student_performance" GROUP BY "school_name" ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 25

widgets.title: School Name Composition by Department
widgets.description: Shows the count of students per school broken down by department to visualize the composition of departments within each school.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT "school_name" AS label, "department" AS "group", CAST(COUNT(*) AS DOUBLE) AS value FROM "t_student_performance" GROUP BY label, "group" ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 25

widgets.title: Attendance Pct Proportion by School Name
widgets.description: Proportion of average attendance percentage grouped by each school name.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT "school_name" AS label, AVG("attendance_pct") AS value FROM "t_student_performance" GROUP BY "school_name" ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 30

widgets.title: Final Score vs Gpa Points by School Name
widgets.description: Comparison of average final scores and average GPA points for students grouped by school name.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT "school_name" AS label, CAST(AVG(TRY_CAST("final_score" AS DOUBLE)) AS DOUBLE) AS value1, CAST(AVG("gpa_points") AS DOUBLE) AS value2 FROM "t_student_performance" GROUP BY "school_name" ORDER BY (value1 + value2) DESC LIMIT 20

widgets.title: Data Overview Table
widgets.description: A tabular overview of student performance data including demographics, academic scores, and attendance.

widgets.title: Multi-Metric Profile by School Name
widgets.description: Comparison of average GPA points, average attendance percentage, and average weekly study hours across schools.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT "school_name" AS axis, CAST(AVG("gpa_points") AS DOUBLE) AS "value" FROM "t_student_performance" GROUP BY "school_name" UNION ALL SELECT "school_name" AS axis, CAST(AVG("attendance_pct") AS DOUBLE) AS "value" FROM "t_student_performance" GROUP BY "school_name" UNION ALL SELECT "school_name" AS axis, CAST(AVG("study_hours_weekly") AS DOUBLE) AS "value" FROM "t_student_performance" GROUP BY "school_name" ORDER BY "value" DESC LIMIT 12
